parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "gpt-4o", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a master data extractor. Extract all items from the requested text into a JSON array of objects. Keys to extract for each object: 'name' (string) - Full name including vintage and grape if present; 'article' (string) - Manufacturer article number or code; 'qty' (number); 'purchase_price' (number); 'volume_l' (number) - e.g. 0.75; 'country' (string); 'category' (string); 'note' (string) - additional notes, ratings, grapes, region. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON array, no markdown." }, { "role": "user", "content": $('Extract PDF1').first().json.text } ] }) }}
